description: Extended text corpus for Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) aligned with UCF-Crime dataset taxonomy.
source_paper: Real-world Anomaly Detection in Surveillance Videos

prompt_config.note: Configuration for immunity patches and class refinements moved from Python script.
normal_immunity_texts: People walking close to each other
People interacting in a friendly way
Customers browsing items in a shop
People browsing items in a store

class_overrides.shoplifting: thief stealing items secretly in a shop
class_overrides.fighting: people fighting and punching each other

normal_street: A regular street scene with pedestrians walking peacefully on the sidewalk.
Surveillance view of a busy intersection with normal traffic flow.
People walking casually in a public area without any aggressive behavior.
Vehicles moving steadily along the road adhering to traffic rules.
A quiet street corner at night with minimal activity and no unusual events.
Shoppers entering and exiting stores in a normal, orderly manner.
A group of people standing and talking on the roadside peacefully.
Routine urban monitoring showing standard daily activities of citizens.
Pedestrians waiting for the traffic light to change at a crosswalk.
A wide-angle view of a city street with no anomalous events detected.
Normal background activity including trees waving in the wind.
Crowd moving naturally through a walkway during rush hour.
Bicycles and cars sharing the road in a lawful and safe manner.
Surveillance footage of a public square with ordinary social interactions.
A peaceful neighborhood street with residents going about their day.
People jogging or exercising in a park area captured by CCTV.
Public transport vehicles picking up passengers at a bus stop.
A bustling market street with vendors and customers interacting normally.
Cars parked legally along the side of the road with no disturbance.
Standard CCTV footage showing a calm environment with no threats.

abuse: A person physically abusing an animal in a public space.
An individual repeatedly hitting a helpless victim or animal.
Footage showing cruel behavior or mistreatment of a living being.
A person kicking and beating a dog on the sidewalk.
Surveillance capturing an adult physically mistreating a child.
An act of cruelty where someone is forcefully hurting a pet.
A person dragging and striking a victim repeatedly.
Aggressive behavior directed towards a defenseless animal.
Video evidence of animal cruelty in an urban environment.
A person using an object to beat an animal or person.
Visible physical abuse occurring in an open area.
An individual acting violently towards a small animal.
Harsh physical treatment of a subordinate or victim.
A person inflicting pain on a dog in a back alley.
Unjustified physical aggression towards a helpless entity.
A scene showing the mistreatment and hitting of an animal.
Someone repeatedly slapping or punching a victim who is not fighting back.
Violent behavior demonstrating abuse of power over a victim.
A person aggressively handling and hurting a pet.
CCTV footage of persistent physical abuse.
arrest: Police officers restraining a suspect on the ground.
Law enforcement making an arrest and handcuffing an individual.
A suspect being chased and apprehended by security forces.
Officers forcing a person into a police patrol car.
A person being detained by uniformed officers.
Police holding a suspect against a wall for searching.
Surveillance of a suspect surrendering to police.
A group of officers taking a criminal into custody.
An individual being tackled by law enforcement agents.
Handcuffing a suspect after a pursuit.
Police questioning and then detaining a person.
Officers escorting a handcuffed individual away.
A suspect resisting arrest before being subdued.
Law enforcement securing a crime scene and arresting a perpetrator.
A person being read their rights and handcuffed.
Two officers grabbing a suspect and restraining them.
A police intervention resulting in the arrest of a man.
The process of arresting a suspect captured on camera.
Police neutralizing a threat and making an arrest.
A suspect lying face down while being handcuffed by police.
arson: A person intentionally setting fire to a vehicle or building.
Smoke and flames appearing suddenly due to a malicious act.
An individual using an incendiary device to start a fire.
Pouring gasoline on a car and lighting it on fire.
A sudden eruption of fire caused by a Molotov cocktail.
Surveillance showing a person starting a fire in a store.
Flames engulfing a property after suspicious activity.
An arsonist lighting a fire in a public trash bin.
Someone throwing a burning object into a building.
Unexplained fire starting rapidly in a parked car.
A person running away after setting something on fire.
The ignition of a flammable substance by a criminal.
Fire spreading quickly from a source of arson.
An individual purposefully igniting debris near a house.
Visuals of a firebomb being thrown.
A criminal act involving the burning of property.
Smoke rising after a person manipulates a fuel container.
Intentional destruction of property using fire.
A person lighting a fuse or flammable liquid.
Footage of an arson attack on a commercial establishment.

A sudden act of violence where an individual strikes a victim.
Surveillance capturing a physical altercation initiated by an aggressor.
A person slapping and shoving another individual forcefully.
An unprovoked physical attack on a pedestrian.
Someone beating a victim who is lying on the ground.
Aggressive bodily harm being inflicted on a person.
A violent assault involving hitting and kicking.
One individual grabbing and throwing another to the ground.
A physical confrontation where one person attacks the other.
An assailant striking a victim with an object.
Repeated punching directed at a person's head or body.
A brawl where one person is clearly assaulting another.
Video showing a person being knocked down by an attacker.
Physical violence occurring in a hallway or room.
An aggressor chasing and tackling a victim to assault them.
Someone violently pushing and striking a passerby.
A person being cornered and beaten by an attacker.
Assault involving forceful physical contact.
The act of physically hurting another person captured on video.

Smoke billowing rapidly after a detonation.
A blast wave knocking people and objects over.
Explosive materials igniting and causing destruction.
A sudden release of energy causing a loud boom and fire.
The aftermath of an explosion with smoke and fire.
A localized blast destroying a specific target.

Concealing merchandise to avoid payment.
